title: Dark Fantasy Visuals
description: A complete visual overhaul that reimagines Minecraft with a darker, moodier, high-fantasy aesthetic.
body:
### Overview Dark Fantasy Java is a complete visual overhaul that reimagines Minecraft with a darker, moodier, high-fantasy aesthetic. Every texture has been hand-crafted to give your world a grim, atmospheric feel without sacrificing the look you know. This is a free Java Edition port of our Dark Fantasy 2.0 pack from the Minecraft Bedrock Marketplace. ### What's included: - Blocks: A full set of retextured blocks, including stone, wood, ores, and decorative variants, with added block variations for a more natural, less repetitive world. - Items: Reworked tools, weapons, food, and more, all styled to match the dark fantasy theme. - Biomes: Modified grass, foliage, sky, and fog colors to create a unique and moody atmosphere across the world.
Built for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11. Requires [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone). Listen to the OFFICIAL Soundtrack [here](https://open.spotify.com/album/0jDCTKgDbRqOHBM8d5XexG?si=4AX_eL2LROq6xj5KuwQzOA).
